data.body:
“You’ve been awake long enough. You need to rest. You can explain everything to me afterward, okay?”

Bakugou can’t even respond. He’s out like a light as soon as Shouta finishes talking. He sits there for a moment, continuing to pet his hair.
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body:
Shouta sits in the chair next to the bed, and Bakugou’s posture becomes rigid as he senses the shift in atmosphere. He clears his throat. “I guess it’s time for your questions?”

Shouta nods. “I’m sorry I need to pry into your private life like this, but I can’t put this off any longer.
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body: “You smell nice, I guess.” Bakugou suddenly says, and Shouta snorts. “I thought your scent was just bland ass vanilla, but up close I can tell it’s different. Our scents are actually kind of close. Mine is just sweeter.”
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body:
